channel.title: Incident Response on Embrace The Red
channel.description: Recent content in Incident Response on Embrace The Red

item.title: Autonomous AI Intrusions Are Here: Lessons from the Hugging Face Compromise
item.description:
A confirmed AI-run intrusion now has a victim, and a disclosure. In July 2026, Hugging Face disclosed an intrusion that it says was driven end to end by an autonomous AI agent system.

The capability is here, and defensive architectures need to adapt.

There are other warning signs as well. Sysdig recently published research on JADEPUFFER, which it assesses to be an agent-driven database-extortion operation capable of adapting failed attack steps in real time. However, the report does not clearly explain whether the activity was observed in a real victim environment, a honeypot, or another instrumented research setup. It is therefore best treated as an important signal rather than definitive proof of an autonomous ransomware campaign.
